Description: The LLM first reasons about schema and constraints (the "checklist") before generating the CSV body.
Role of Validator: Provides the formal specification (schema) that populates the checklist.

Description: The LLM is prompted to correct a CSV based on a structured error report from the validator.
Role of Validator: Acts as the oracle, producing the error_report.json that serves as the training label.

Description: An automated driver script iteratively calls the LLM to repair a CSV until the validator accepts it.
Role of Validator: Runs repeatedly on the output of the LLM, providing feedback at each step.
Key Artifacts: A small orchestrator script (e.g., in Python or Rust) that uses the CLI. 10
